summary: Plan-only PR inventory shard. The preflight artifact hydrates 20 open PRs; all hydrated items are independent PRs with no shared canonical and no safe close/merge/fix action available under this job. The remaining 20 listed candidates are not present in the compacted preflight artifact, so they need refreshed hydration before classification with live target_updated_at.
